description_long: This is a modern, rectangular bench with a slatted wooden seat and robust, angular metal supports on each end. The seat consists of evenly spaced wooden planks running lengthwise, providing both comfort and drainage. The metal legs are solid, dark-colored, and form a geometric, inverted 'L' shape, giving the bench a contemporary and sturdy appearance. The bench lacks both a backrest and armrests, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design suitable for public spaces. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to outdoor elements. Its clean lines and neutral tones make it suitable for parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas.
description: A modern bench with a slatted wooden seat and sturdy, angular metal supports, designed for public outdoor use. The minimalist design lacks backrests and armrests, emphasizing durability and simplicity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the slatted wooden seat and both angular metal supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat, the end profile of the slats, and the solid metal leg.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the slatted seat and both metal supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the end profile of the slats and the metal leg.
